observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-ea9b2a06
The file body after frontmatter is empty
standouts: The target is expressed as a board://item-ea9b2a06 URI
The entire content is frontmatter metadata with no explanatory body
It is explicitly typed as a board_items attachment

notes: A bare metadata stub that records an attachment-to-board-item link for dragnet-development with no descriptive payload.
